name: Pershing Resources Company, Inc.
summary: Pershing Resources Company, Inc. engages in the exploration and development of precious and base metals in Arizona and Nevada. It primarily explores for gold, copper, and silver deposits. The company focuses on the development of its 100% owned New Enterprise project located in Kingman, Arizona. It also holds interest in other exploration properties located in Arizona and Nevada. The company was formerly known as Xenolix, Technologies, Inc. Pershing Resources Company, Inc. was incorporated in 1996 and is based in Reno, Nevada.
